mapper.select:
select inputSysId, inputObjEngName, sourceTableName, dataId, tableId, centerId, inputObjChiName, inputIobjSource, iorStatus, outSysId, outObjEngName, outObjChiName, outOobjSource, insertDate, tableRealName from (select f4.sys_id as inputSysId, f4.obj_engname as inputObjEngName, f4.obj_chiname as sourceTableName, f4.data_id as dataId, f4.table_id as tableId, f4.center_Id as centerId, case when f4.obj_memo is not null then f4.obj_memo else f4.OBJ_CHINAME end as inputObjChiName, f4.iobj_source as inputIobjSource, f1.IOR_STATUS as iorStatus, f7.sys_id AS outSysId, f7.obj_engname AS outObjEngName, f7.obj_chiname AS outObjChiName, f7.oobj_source AS outOobjSource, f4.insert_date as insertDate, case when f4.data_id is not null then f4.table_id else f8.tablename end as tableRealName from standardize_inputobjectrelate f1 inner join (select sys_id, OBJ_ENGNAME, data_id, table_id, OBJ_CHINAME, iobj_source, iobj_guid, insert_date, obj_memo, center_Id from standardize_inputobject f2 inner join standardize_object f3 on f3.obj_guid = f2.obj_guid where f2.iobj_status = 1) f4 on f1.iobj_guid = f4.iobj_guid inner join (select oobj_guid, sys_id, OBJ_ENGNAME, OBJ_CHINAME, oobj_source from standardize_outputobject f5 inner join standardize_object f6 on f5.OBJ_GUID = f6.obj_guid where f5.OOBJ_STATUS = 1) f7 on f1.OOBJ_GUID = f7.oobj_guid left join (select tablename, tableid from synlte.OBJECT) f8 on f8.tableid = f4.OBJ_ENGNAME)
iorStatus = 1
and UPPER(outObjEngName) = UPPER(#{tableId})
order by insertDate desc

select count(*) from STANDARDIZE_INPUTOBJECTRELATE F4 inner join (select * from STANDARDIZE_OUTPUTOBJECT F1 inner join STANDARDIZE_OBJECT F2 on F1.OBJ_GUID = F2.OBJ_GUID where upper(F2.OBJ_ENGNAME) = upper(#{tableId})) F3 on F3.OOBJ_GUID = F4.OOBJ_GUID where f4.iobj_guid = #{inputObjGuid}

select distinct outobjengname as value, objectname as label from (select outobjengname, objectname from (select f4.sys_id as inputSysId, f4.OBJ_ENGNAME as inputObjEngName, f4.data_id as dataId, f4.table_id as tableId, f4.OBJ_CHINAME as inputObjChiName, f4.IOBJ_SOURCE as inputIobjSource, f1.IOR_STATUS as iorStatus, f7.sys_id as outSysId, f7.OBJ_ENGNAME as outObjEngName, f7.OBJ_CHINAME as outObjChiName, f7.OOBJ_SOURCE as outOobjSource, f8.tablename as tableRealName, f8.objectname as objectname from STANDARDIZE_INPUTOBJECTRELATE f1 inner join (select sys_id, OBJ_ENGNAME, data_id, table_id, OBJ_CHINAME, IOBJ_SOURCE, IOBJ_GUID from STANDARDIZE_INPUTOBJECT f2 inner join STANDARDIZE_OBJECT f3 on f3.OBJ_GUID = f2.obj_guid where f2.iobj_status = 1) f4 on upper(f1.IOBJ_GUID) = upper(f4.IOBJ_GUID) inner join (select sys_id, OBJ_ENGNAME, OBJ_CHINAME, OOBJ_SOURCE, oobj_guid from STANDARDIZE_OUTPUTOBJECT f5 inner join STANDARDIZE_OBJECT f6 on f5.OBJ_GUID = f6.obj_guid where f5.OOBJ_STATUS = 1) f7 on upper(f1.OOBJ_GUID) = upper(f7.oobj_guid) inner join (select tablename, tableid, objectname from synlte.OBJECT where deleted = 0 and relate_tablename = 'OBJECTFIELD' and upper(sourceid) = upper(#{sourceId})) f8 on upper(f8.tableid) = upper(f7.OBJ_ENGNAME)) where iorStatus = 1) t1
